items.title: Admissions open for Academic Year 2026-27
items.text: Admission enquiries are open for Nursery to Class XI. Parents may contact the admission office for eligibility and campus visit details.

items.title: Office timings for parent enquiries
items.text: The school office is open Monday to Saturday from 9:00 AM to 4:30 PM.

items.title: Academic calendar available at school office
items.text: Parents may collect the current academic calendar from the school office or download the shared information sheet.
